# Work Packages: Doctrine Org Init From Template

**Inputs**: Design documents from `/kitty-specs/doctrine-org-init-from-template-01KXNA6P/`
**Prerequisites**: plan.md (required), spec.md, research.md, data-model.md, contracts/, quickstart.md

**Tests**: Explicit ATDD coverage required (charter ATDD-first + existing CliRunner suite).

**Organization**: Fine-grained subtasks (`Txxx`) roll up into work packages (`WPxx`). Each work package must be independently deliverable and testable.

**Prompt Files**: Each work package references a matching prompt file in `/tasks/` generated by `/spec-kitty.tasks`.

**Audience**: Operators who create their own doctrine via extended `spec-kitty doctrine org init`.

## Path Conventions

- Library: `src/specify_cli/doctrine/template_render/`
- CLI: `src/specify_cli/cli/commands/doctrine.py`
- Tests: `tests/specify_cli/doctrine/`, `tests/cli/`

## Subtask Index

| ID | Description | WP | Parallel |
|---|---|---|---|
| T001 | RED: ORG_NAME / LOCAL_PATH validation unit tests | WP01 | |
| T002 | Implement validation helpers + rule_id errors | WP01 | |
| T003 | RED: TEMPLATE parse + branch conflict unit tests | WP01 | [P] |
| T004 | Implement local/git TEMPLATE resolve via GitSource | WP01 | |
| T005 | Package public types (RenderRequest, ResolvedTemplateSource) | WP01 | |
| T006 | RED: `.templateignore` + built-in exclude copy tests | WP02 | |
| T007 | Implement ignore matcher + full-tree copy | WP02 | |
| T008 | RED: token substitute + leftover-token tests | WP02 | [P] |
| T009 | Implement substitute walk + leftover assert | WP02 | |
| T010 | Orchestrate validate→resolve→copy→substitute pipeline | WP02 | |
| T011 | RED: CliRunner template-path + minimal-scaffold regression | WP03 | |
| T012 | Wire `--template` / `--org-name` / `--local-path` / `--branch` on `org_init` | WP03 | |
| T013 | Error surfacing (NFR-001) + success output for render path | WP03 | |

---

## Work Package WP01: Validation & Template Resolve (Priority: P0)

**Goal**: Ship fail-closed ORG_NAME/LOCAL_PATH validation and local/git TEMPLATE resolve (including dual branch surface) as a testable doctrine library package.
**Independent Test**: Unit tests pass for validation rule_ids, local path resolve, git resolve (mocked GitSource), and branch conflict detection without touching the CLI.
**Prompt**: `/tasks/WP01-validation-and-resolve.md`
**Requirement Refs**: FR-003, FR-004, FR-005, FR-006, FR-010, C-001, C-002, C-004

### Included Subtasks

- [x] T001 RED: ORG_NAME / LOCAL_PATH validation unit tests
- [x] T002 Implement validation helpers + rule_id errors
- [x] T003 [P] RED: TEMPLATE parse + branch conflict unit tests
- [x] T004 Implement local/git TEMPLATE resolve via GitSource
- [x] T005 Package public types (RenderRequest, ResolvedTemplateSource)

### Implementation Notes

- Create `src/specify_cli/doctrine/template_render/` package (`validation.py`, `resolve.py`, `__init__.py` exports).
- ORG_NAME rules exactly match doctrine-template downstream contract (no sanitising).
- LOCAL_PATH default `pack` is applied by callers/pipeline; validation accepts resolved non-empty values.
- Reuse `specify_cli.doctrine.sources.git_source.GitSource` for clones into temp dirs.

### Parallel Opportunities

- T003 fixtures can be drafted alongside T001/T002 once the package path exists.

### Dependencies

- None.

### Risks & Mitigations

- SSH `git@` vs `@branch` ambiguity → prefer `#ref` encoding; document `@ref` only for https/ssh:// URLs (research.md).

---

## Work Package WP02: Ignore-Copy, Substitute & Pipeline (Priority: P0)

**Goal**: Copy full template trees honouring `.templateignore` (plus built-in excludes), substitute tokens, fail on leftovers, and expose one pipeline entrypoint.
**Independent Test**: Unit tests prove ignored paths absent, tokens replaced, leftover tokens fail, and pipeline rolls back/cleans temp on failure.
**Prompt**: `/tasks/WP02-ignore-copy-and-substitute.md`
**Requirement Refs**: FR-007, FR-008, FR-009, FR-010, C-003, NFR-003

### Included Subtasks

- [x] T006 RED: `.templateignore` + built-in exclude copy tests
- [x] T007 Implement ignore matcher + full-tree copy
- [x] T008 [P] RED: token substitute + leftover-token tests
- [x] T009 Implement substitute walk + leftover assert
- [x] T010 Orchestrate validate→resolve→copy→substitute pipeline

### Implementation Notes

- Add `ignore_copy.py` and `substitute.py`; pipeline function in `__init__.py` or `pipeline.py`.
- Built-in excludes: `.git/`, `.templateignore`.
- UTF-8 text substitute; undecodable files left unchanged (research.md).
- Depends on WP01 types/validators/resolve.

### Parallel Opportunities

- T008 can proceed once destination fixtures exist independently of T006.

### Dependencies

- Depends on WP01.

### Risks & Mitigations

- Partial PACK_PATH on failure → prefer temp staging then move when destination did not exist.

---

## Work Package WP03: CLI Wiring & Compatibility (Priority: P1) 🎯 MVP operator surface

**Goal**: Extend `spec-kitty doctrine org init` with template options while preserving minimal-scaffold behaviour and existing CliRunner tests.
**Independent Test**: CliRunner covers no-template scaffold, template local render happy path, invalid ORG_NAME, overwrite guard, and existing validate fixtures still pass.
**Prompt**: `/tasks/WP03-cli-wiring.md`
**Requirement Refs**: FR-001, FR-002, NFR-001, NFR-002

### Included Subtasks

- [x] T011 RED: CliRunner template-path + minimal-scaffold regression
- [x] T012 Wire `--template` / `--org-name` / `--local-path` / `--branch` on `org_init`
- [x] T013 Error surfacing (NFR-001) + success output for render path

### Implementation Notes

- Keep `org_init` thin: build `RenderRequest`, call pipeline, print errors with rule_id.
- Do not require `--org-name` when `--template` omitted.
- Extend `tests/cli/test_doctrine_org_commands.py` without weakening existing cases.

### Parallel Opportunities

- None (single CLI surface).

### Dependencies

- Depends on WP02.

### Risks & Mitigations

- Accidental behaviour change on minimal path → keep existing assertions green before adding template cases.

---

## Parallelization Notes

- WP01 then WP02 then WP03 (strict library → pipeline → CLI).
- Within WP01/WP02, RED test drafting marked `[P]` can overlap implementation of unrelated helpers once paths exist.

## MVP Recommendation

- WP01 + WP02 deliver the library; **WP03** is the operator-visible MVP. Ship all three before PR.
